title: log.stream
description: Subscribe to recent log entries with cursor-based resume. The backend returns an initial window from the cursor forward and pushes subsequent added events as new entries are emitted.

cursor.description: Opaque id of the last delivered LogEntry. Format: aud:<n> or dia:<n> (A1). Omit to receive the most recent window up to LOG_BUFFER_SIZE.

level_min.description: Optional minimum severity. Server-side filter; the client may also filter further. Defaults to debug.

include_diagnostics.description: Include source = 'diagnostic' entries. Defaults to true for the panel; export defaults this to false.

source_filter.description: Optional filter to one or more source values. When present, only entries whose source matches one of the listed values are returned (R-SourceFilter). Omit to receive all sources.

window_size.description: Initial window size on a no-cursor subscription. Capped at the UI ring buffer size.

added.description: One or more entries appended to the stream. Ordered oldest-first within the event payload. May include truncation signal when the cursor predates retained history.

truncated.description: True when the requested cursor predates the oldest retained entry (vacuum gap). The UI should render an inline 'History gap' marker (A4).

truncated_count.description: Estimated count of entries that existed before the oldest retained entry. Null when the audit vacuum does not record counts.

errors.message: The supplied cursor was not found in the current session. The client should restart subscription with no cursor.
The backend closed the stream. The client may retry; a reconnect emits one diagnostic event.

id.description: Stable prefixed id. aud:<n> for audit-sourced entries; dia:<n> for diagnostic entries (A1). Monotonic within each namespace within a session.

contract_version.description: Schema version of this LogEntry shape (H1). Will be camelCase'd in the future envelope sweep.

time.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at server-side emission.

source.description: Emitter tag. Closed enum aligned to spec 002 event-bus topic prefixes (R-SourceEnum). Diagnostic events use the literal 'diagnostic'.

request_id.description: Operation id correlating one user intent across multiple events. Required for workflow events; optional for diagnostics.

entity_type.description: Referenced entity kind, when known. Enum is the spec 002 AssetType enum (includes 'target' per spec 013 amendment, 'data_source' per spec 014 amendment — E-019-2). Omitted for diagnostics.

entity_id.description: Stable id of the referenced entity. Required when entity_type is present.
